title: QBModPack
description:
A collection of mods to enhance the minecraft playing experience!
Including: shaders, minimap and much more!
body:
# QuartetBaguetteModPack
## A collection of client side mods for version 1.21.10 running Fabric.
<details>
<summary>List of mods </summary>
  
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) 
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)
- [Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)
- [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)
</details>

This is a wellrounded modpack that should work on most servers running 1.21.10.
Elements such as proximity voice chat have te have been setup on the server by the server owner.

### Updates
The collection of mods may change and certain configurations may change in future iterations of the modpack.
